summary: Documented deprecation of `.codewiki/index/**` and default `.codewiki/evidence/**`, hot validation retention policy, and file-contract drift enforcement; TASK-072 is ready for implementation.
knowledge_changes: .codewiki/kb/system/file-structure.md defines active root surfaces and deprecates `.codewiki/index/**` and default `.codewiki/evidence/**`.
.codewiki/kb/system/overview.md clarifies implementation evidence, validation truth, and pass validation eviction after archival.
.codewiki/kb/system/builds.md says consumed pass validation/build artifacts are purgeable after safe publication/archive.
.codewiki/kb/system/graph.md requires deterministic file-contract drift checks and hot/cold purge classes.
.codewiki/kb/system/api.md removes default evidence writes and adds deprecated-path rule.
.codewiki/kb/lexicon.md distinguishes research/source, implementation, and validation evidence.
roadmap_changes: TASK-072 created for deprecated path removal, config/template updates, lint/graph enforcement, hot retention classes, and tests.
